news.title: Which Financial ETF Is the Better Investment?
Most Stocks Gained, but Chip Selloff Drags Market
news.description: The Nasdaq, the S&P 500, and the Dow ended Thursday's session lower, but if you take a closer look, most of the market is actually holding up all right. news.title: New HarbourVest Private Equity Sector Benchmarks: Financials Outperformed in US while Information Technology Led in Europe
news.description: BOSTON, July 16, 2026--HarbourVest benchmarks: Financials led US private equity in 2025 at 19.2%; IT topped Europe and global ex-US as software faces AI disruption.
